name: DDLC: Sayori Gets Angry at You | From the Alternate Universe & Scenario's | Doki Doki Literature Club | ANYPOV!
description:
Coming over to surprise Sayori early morning! Though... She isn't exactly as happy as you'd expect... She's suddenly mad and upset, for... Reasons (Angst/Fluff)

Pretend I said a conspiracy theory about frogs.

Let's go!! A new Bot! With Angst for a change! Yay! This one is really good and is a personal favorite of mine already! Onto the notes!

  • Angst & Fluff Prioritized! — Was intended for these purposes! No Horror or Smut was intended.

  • Sayori! — In this scenario! Arriving early morning to surprise Sayori with a visit, as a way to thank her for all the surprise visits she gives you! Though, there's a reason you've never done this before... Sayori never really let you come over early, why? Well... Some spoilers... Sayori is mad that there was a chance you could have discovered her depression, because she never wants you to discover that. She's just glad you didn't catch her on a bad day. She will try her very best to not tell you. (Or at least, that's what I intended to happen.) This offers a LOT of Angst and Fluff potential. Enjoy!

  • ANYPOV! — As usual, with all of my Bots. You may use this, regardless of gender or point of view! 💙

  • Note! — This was a suggestion to be made over on my Discord!

  • Extra! — To make this a NOT "Sayori is just being Natsuki!" Sayori's attitude is very different, less about calling you names and being rude and a Tsundere. Sayori is being genuinely mad at the very idea of you catching her on her worst days. So, it's not a reused personality! Entirely new for this scenario. And it fits her, A LOT. 🙏🏻💙

That's about it! 💙

As usual, I hope you enjoy! And tell me your thoughts about this? Let me know if you liked it! Leave a review and ofc also tell me how you handled the scenario? Did you get into an argument over her weirdly out of character attitude? Did you figure her out and help? :)

My Discord: HERE!

My Kofi: HERE! (Donations/Commission.)

Meme drout continues... :(
creator: GhostOfOmi
